title: Diagnose a low hit rate
description: Attribute misses to expiry, eviction, or never-cached reads, then fix the dominant cause.
body: Steps: 1. Measure hit rate and break misses into expiry, eviction, and never-cached. 2. If evictions dominate, compare memory limit and key cardinality against capacity. 3. If expiry dominates, check whether the TTL is shorter than the access interval. 4. If never-cached, confirm the read path consults the cache before the origin. 5. Adjust the dominant factor and re-measure. Rollback point: before raising memory limits in production. Validation: hit rate rises and origin load falls after the targeted change.
